description: Uploads a lab fixture whose extracted field_value_json.collection_date='2020-08-14'. Asserts procedure_order.date_ordered, procedure_report.date_report, and procedure_result.date all equal 2020-08-14 — NOT the upload/extraction timestamp.
what_bug_this_catches: If LabResultWriter regresses to using the extraction timestamp (clock->now() or time()) for date_ordered/date_report/date instead of the VLM-extracted field_value_json.collection_date, FHIR Observation effectiveDateTime carries the upload date rather than the historical lab date. This case uploads a fixture with a 2020 collection date and asserts the date columns match the lab time, not the extraction time — required for the Phase 7.1 lab-trend widget to render real trends instead of a single stacked point.

input.query: Upload lipid panel with collection_date=2020-08-14 in extracted facts.
